features.name: basic modport expression with input direction
features.description: Code should include a modport declaration using expression syntax with input direction, mapping a virtual port name to an interface signal

features.name: basic modport expression with output direction
features.description: Code should include a modport declaration using expression syntax with output direction, mapping a virtual port name to an interface signal

features.name: mixed regular and expression items in modport
features.description: Code should include a modport with both regular signal connections and expression-based virtual port mappings

features.name: multiple same-direction expressions in modport
features.description: Code should include a modport with multiple expression-based connections of the same direction

features.name: nested interface path in modport expression
features.description: Code should include a modport expression using a nested interface path with dot notation to reference signals in sub-interfaces

features.name: four-level deep nesting in modport expression
features.description: Code should include a modport expression with a four-level deep dotted path referencing a signal through multiple nested interfaces
